    descriptionXhargreg: ”Remember the mutagenic poison you discovered from the Experimental Macrophages back in Sarkinon? It seems like the Nezerians have perfected this toxin, so why don’t you go and make yourself useful... collect about…. a bit of it? I would recommend filling that ship of yours to the brim with the mutagenic poison… by doing it that way you can get enough in just one trip! Think about the time you’ll save!!! Hehehehhrgrhghghgh!”*Gather Poison from 64 Bionic Macrophages*

    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Hurry back here!! I can’t wait to make more giant wasps!!” Crew: “Are you sure Captain?” Crew: “I hate wasps!!” Crew: “Uhg... this stuff can’t be healthy, let’s just dump it somewhere… ”
